URSOfferComparer Docs
Table of Contents

External Dependencies

The included text file contains all external references or modules to NuGet-Packages, that are used within the VisualStudio Solution. It is regenerated with every build of the solution.

Note
Reference Version License Type License
coverlet.collector 6.0.0 MIT https://licenses.nuget.org/MIT
NUnit 4.2.2 MIT https://licenses.nuget.org/MIT
NUnit.Analyzers 3.9.0 license.txt https://www.nuget.org/packages/NUnit.Analyzers/3.9.0/License
NUnit3TestAdapter 4.6.0 MIT https://licenses.nuget.org/MIT
Roslynator.Analyzers 4.13.1 Apache-2.0 https://licenses.nuget.org/Apache-2.0
Syntegon.Tools.MessageLoggerCore 2.3.0
ToolsCodingGuidelines 0.3.0
